name: Team Christy
subject: We're hoping you can help today, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Yesterday, we told you that we are starting to get a bit stressed about the amount of Republican special interest money pouring into this race.

We asked if 500 of you could step up to give a grassroots donation to show the strength of our campaign. Lots of donors did, but we haven't seen a donation from you, Peter.

**[We're only 167 donors away from meeting our goal -- if you are able to right now, can you help us close that gap and reach 500 donors by midnight?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b882/29776869/a2e840f/569f5062/765025675/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTlfNTAwZ29hbDItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200419_500goal2-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b882/29776869/a2e840f/569f5063/765025675/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTlfNTAwZ29hbDItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200419_500goal2-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b882/29776869/a2e840f/569f507c/765025675/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTlfNTAwZ29hbDItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200419_500goal2-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b882/29776869/a2e840f/569f507d/765025675/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTlfNTAwZ29hbDItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200419_500goal2-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b882/29776869/a2e840f/569f507e/765025675/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTlfNTAwZ29hbDItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200419_500goal2-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b882/29776869/a2e840f/569f507f/765025675/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTlfNTAwZ29hbDItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200419_500goal2-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b882/29776869/a2e840f/569f5062/765025675/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTlfNTAwZ29hbDItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200419_500goal2-full")
We're so grateful for the way you all have stepped up to help us meet this goal.

We won't sugarcoat it -- it's daunting to be running against a candidate who is so well funded by special interest groups. And with an entirely vote-by-mail election on our hands, it's hard to predict how this will turn out.

**The one thing that has been consistent this whole time is your support. You've never wavered, and when we've asked for help, we've always received it. For that, we are so grateful, especially in these tough times.**

We're only 23 days away from our special election. That leaves us just 23 days to leave it all on the field -- reach as many voters by phone call, text message, and letter as possible. You stepping up again today means we can do that.

**[So, we're asking you again to give us a hand by making a grassroots contribution to our campaign. Can you be the one to get us to our goal?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b882/29776869/a2e840f/569f5062/765025675/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTlfNTAwZ29hbDItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200419_500goal2-full")**

Thank you so much. We are not Team Christy without you.

\-- Team Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b882/29776869/a2e840f/569f5062/765025675/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTlfNTAwZ29hbDItZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200419_500goal2-full")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---

name: Team Tomlinson
subject: Teresa’s call to action in the Washington Post
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friends — The Washington Post interviewed Teresa last week to get her take on Georgia’s two Senate races at the center of the coronavirus insider trading scandal — and what Democratic wins in both of these races would do for our shot at a Senate majority.
The Post writes that “the national interest in the two races has yet to match the scale of the opportunity.” You have to see the call to action Teresa made to Democrats across America next:
“We’re going to make political history in Georgia, and I hope they want to be a part of that, because it’s going to happen. It’s going to happen this year, and it’s going to happen in November.”
—Teresa Tomlinson, Washington Post, 4/15/20
Friends, you know that Georgia is the Senate battleground in 2020. We need you to be a part of this fight in order to win. Teresa does not accept corporate PAC money. We simply cannot compete against Perdue, McConnell, and Donald Trump’s limitless corporate war chest without you.
We’re 50 days out from this primary election and need to raise $6,112 before midnight to stay on track with our next deadline only ten days away. The nation’s eyes are on Georgia’s senators, friend — we have to take advantage of this moment. Donate right now: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt_q2_2020?refcode=em042020&refcode2=eefec864-1083-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true]
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17198766/186310859/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDE0YTVmYS0xNTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0TfIluOb7J38i261oMOdQ2BiAlYtdJGfmHgjid05Ps=&emci=fc14a5fa-1583-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=fd14a5fa-1583-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6233172)

Peter, **We did it — we just scored a major victory in the courts!** We are all at risk if we vote in person during the coronavirus outbreak. A Texas district judge agreed and has signed an order saying all Texans can now request a mail-in ballot instead of risking their health at the polls. This is a big development for Texas Democrats — and the culmination of our advocacy and a timely lawsuit by the Texas Democratic Party. Every person deserves to vote in a safe and healthy way if we are going to have a free and fair election.

I am working hard to make sure the people in this district know about this important change — letting them know they need to apply for their ballots. But, that is going to take a lot of resources. **[I need your help to make sure every one in our district knows about this ruling. Can you chip in right now so we can spread this great news far and wide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17198767/186310860/203122784?refcode=em042020&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDE0YTVmYS0xNTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0TfIluOb7J38i261oMOdQ2BiAlYtdJGfmHgjid05Ps=)**
[Donate right Now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17198768/186310861/203122784?refcode=em042020&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDE0YTVmYS0xNTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0TfIluOb7J38i261oMOdQ2BiAlYtdJGfmHgjid05Ps=)
This fight isn't over — Texas Republicans will surely appeal this ruling.

The Texas Attorney General issued a statement meant to intimidate Texans from voting by mail. That's all his words are — a threat. This ruling is now the law of the land and the GOP will just have to deal with it. Republicans can try all they want to keep people from voting but we are going to win this fight. **[Help us keep up the fight against the Texas GOP and their anti-voting agenda!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17198769/186310862/203122784?refcode=em042020&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDE0YTVmYS0xNTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0TfIluOb7J38i261oMOdQ2BiAlYtdJGfmHgjid05Ps=)** Thank you for standing with us as we fight for voting rights. We hope our work here in Texas will inspire others states to guarantee universal vote by mail! Fighting for you,
Mike Siegel

[P.S. Check out our recent livestream on the court ruling allowing Texans to vote by mail.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17198770/186310863/1597605062?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDE0YTVmYS0xNTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0TfIluOb7J38i261oMOdQ2BiAlYtdJGfmHgjid05Ps=&emci=fc14a5fa-1583-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=fd14a5fa-1583-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6233172)

clean_body: Peter, We did it — we just scored a major victory in the courts! We are all at risk if we vote in person during the coronavirus outbreak. A Texas district judge agreed and has signed an order saying all Texans can now request a mail-in ballot instead of risking their health at the polls. This is a big development for Texas Democrats — and the culmination of our advocacy and a timely lawsuit by the Texas Democratic Party. Every person deserves to vote in a safe and healthy way if we are going to have a free and fair election. I am working hard to make sure the people in this district know about this important change — letting them know they need to apply for their ballots. But, that is going to take a lot of resources. = = This fight isn't over — Texas Republicans will surely appeal this ruling. The Texas Attorney General issued a statement meant to intimidate Texans from voting by mail. That's all his words are — a threat. This ruling is now the law of the land and the GOP will just have to deal with it. Republicans can try all they want to keep people from voting but we are going to win this fight. = Thank you for standing with us as we fight for voting rights. We hope our work here in Texas will inspire others states to guarantee universal vote by mail! Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Making sure unemployed folks get covered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
**Due to the economic side effects of the COVID-19 crisis, a likely 3.5 million Americans have lost their employer-provided health insurance. **What these folks need now is a re-opened enrollment period on HealthCare.gov, so they can get covered under the Affordable Care Act.

I firmly believe that no one should be forced to weather this health crisis uninsured. President Trump, however, is refusing to open the enrollment window.

**That 's why I'm asking you to co-sign my petition, which demands our President create a special sign-up option for folks who've recently lost their jobs.** [**Will you stand with me by signing on?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mUB96I_bLyof9H_hp1Rt3l33TOqmkZ2O7EgqSO-88lo=/ZyQbljM0CzDStHA-QtKZt6ObbdlUgjJ0-UaK1FwYH1w=)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/mUB96I_bLyof9H_hp1Rt3l33TOqmkZ2O7EgqSO-88lo=/ZyQbljM0CzDStHA-QtKZt6ObbdlUgjJ0-UaK1FwYH1w=)

According to a recent poll, 50% of Americans support re-opening the enrollment window, while only 30% do not.

Helping recently unemployed folks get quality health insurance is just one simple step President Trump could take to make the American people feel more at ease during this precarious time.

**[Show your support for a special enrollment window through the ACA | SIGN ON >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/mUB96I_bLyof9H_hp1Rt3l33TOqmkZ2O7EgqSO-88lo=/ZyQbljM0CzDStHA-QtKZt6ObbdlUgjJ0-UaK1FwYH1w=)**

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/mUB96I_bLyof9H_hp1Rt3l33TOqmkZ2O7EgqSO-88lo=/ZyQbljM0CzDStHA-QtKZt6ObbdlUgjJ0-UaK1FwYH1w=)

Thank you for taking action,
\--_Linda S anchez_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/mUB96I_bLyof9H_hp1Rt3l33TOqmkZ2O7EgqSO-88lo=/KFUl-Qo6vZ6AVBdDz6EG0RSqcUFe33MRi-H9wvWcFAI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mUB96I_bLyof9H_hp1Rt3l33TOqmkZ2O7EgqSO-88lo=/mrdy-sIRz5Y8XGpwPK7zPSh2UAx1ZGhrTkO1c5pnTXE=)

subject: Tomorrow: LIVE with Mike Huckabee - You do not want to miss it!
body:
| | Streaming LIVE on Tuesday
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200420com01&n=1)
| Peter, Governor Mike Huckabee and I are hosting a town hall conversation tomorrow, **Tuesday, April 21, at 9:00 PM (ET), 6:00 PM (PT).** You’ll want to be part of this conversation. I’ll ask where he thinks the country stands after passing the largest stimulus package in history and what impact he sees COVID-19 having on the elections and so much more. **Do you have a question you’d like Governor Huckabee to answer? Send me your question[here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzThPWpvPCyMwA7jvmH-hY_P44hWW7eXEuXwN-j6uYqsOeTrfvx2c7w9NAW3aiMGZAmLTZdxl4SQvuQeHwTQ1tUZ-TAWf-L42ySUvaytbP-w4A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200420com01&n=2), and we will get to as many as we can**. It really is a privilege to have Governor Huckabee serving with My Faith Votes as our Honorary National Chairman. As a former Governor, he understands what is at stake in November, and we’re drawing on his experience to give us a unique biblical perspective on these critical elections. I hope you will join us for this conversation. I believe it’s one you won’t want to miss. RSVP to the LIVE event [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzThPWpvPCyMwA7jvmH-hY_P44hWW7eXEuXwN-j6uYqsOeTrfvx2c7w9NAW3aiMGZAmLTZdxl4SQvuQeHwTQ1tUZ-TAWf-L42ySUvaytbP-w4A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200420com01&n=3). It will be streamed LIVE on both Facebook and YouTube. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzThPWpvPCyMwA7jvmH-hY_P44hWW7eXEuXwN-j6uYqsOeTrfvx2c7w9NAW3aiMGZAmLTZdxl4SQvuQeHwTQ1tUZ-TAWf-L42ySUvaytbP-w4A&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200420com01&n=4) **Pray. name: Matt Mayberry for Congress
subject: Mayberry raises most money in NH in Q1
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress
body:
| |

| Derek Did you hear the news? **The Mayberry for Congress campaign raised the most money _in_ New Hampshire** of any campaign for the Ist CD! Not only did our campaign **out raise Chris Pappas in NH by nearly $20,000**, we raised more than **3x as much** as our Republican primary opponent Matt Mowers.
In fact, Mowers only received 25 total donations from New Hampshire. The majority Mowers's money came from the _DC Swamp and his home state of New Jersey._ New Hampshire Republicans know that Matt Mayberry is the best choice to beat Chris Pappas this fall and thats why the vast majority have joined team Mayberry for Congress! [Will you join Team Mayberry and keep our momentum going by pledging $15, $25 or even $100 to our campaign?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDAzNTc1NDQ1OTE5NjM1MjYwJmM9bDB3MSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzk2OTU5ODYmZD12MnAwdDJ2.jnae5BpkkA1qSbQy50Wo6Ei9Qrfcxq_1Th8NeO6lSV4) Thank you for your continuing support! \- Team Mayberry P.S. Matt's 338 donors from New Hampshire were ALSO by far the most of any candidate in this race! **More than twice as many as Chris Pappas and 14x as many as Matt Mowers**!

---
---
| |
---
| |
---
Who has the most support in New Hampshire?
* Matt Mayberry raised $98,874.22 from 338 New Hampshire donors in the first quarter of our campaign.
* Matt Mayberry out raised Chris Pappas by nearly $20,000 in New Hampshire
* Matt Mayberry had more than twice as many New Hampshire donors as Chris Pappas
* Matt Mayberry raised more than 3x as much money in New Hampshire as Matt Mowers
* Matt Mayberry had nearly 14x as many New Hampshire donors as Matt Mowers
* Matt Mowers only received donations from 25 New Hampshire residents, which is 313 less NH donors than Matt Mayberry - a HUGE difference
* 94% of Matt Mayberry's campaign contributions came from individual donors in New Hampshire. The majority of Chris Pappas and Matt Mowers's money came from the DC Swamp and special interest groups in NJ, NY and Massachusetts.
* **Air Force Veteran Matt Mayberry is the clear choice of New Hampshire voters!**

name: Hegar, MJ
subject: re: health care survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Will you take my brief health care survey to let me know what you think we should do to fix the system?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890320/7f51f7bc/4f77ac9d/4ef11a50/2915914174/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Especially now, Peter, health care is at the front of every Texan's mind. We've been talking for months about how Texas is the most uninsured state in the country and how we need to implement a public option so that everyone can get the health care they need.

**And right now we 're seeing the cracks in our health system and how wide they become when we face a crisis. [Will you take my brief health care survey to let me know what you think we should do to fix the system?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890320/7f51f7bc/4f77ac9d/4ef11a57/2915914174/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-aprhcsurvey")**

Senator Cornyn has attempted to defund or repeal the Affordable Care Act 20 times -- despite that, it's still standing strong. It's still protecting people with pre-existing conditions, allowing young adults to stay on their parents' health care plans until 26, and expanding access to coverage for people across America.

**But it 's clear we need to do more. I want to know what you think about how we can best improve our health care system right now. Will you take my brief survey about the future of health care in America?** **[**TAKE THE SURVEY**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890320/7f51f7bc/4f77ac9d/4ef11a57/2915914174/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-aprhcsurvey")** We've seen just how unprepared our health care system is for a massive pandemic like COVID-19. It's obvious that change is necessary to protect ourselves and ensure that everyone has the quality, affordable care they deserve. **We can 't fix our health care without leaders who listen to us and put public health before the special interests.**

\-- MJ

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890320/7f51f7bc/4f77ac9d/4ef11a56/2915914174/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200420.1fl__1251__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890320/7f51f7bc/4f77ac9d/4ef11a55/2915914174/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1251&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890320/7f51f7bc/4f77ac9d/4ef11a54/2915914174/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

"" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

If you would like to donate, please visit our website == If you instead prefer to donate by mail, please visit == If any of the above information isn't correct or this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, please == P.S. be sure to follow the campaign on == and == If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints or feedback please send us your ideas mailto:info@nrccvictory.com or by replying to this email. == | | NRCC | 320 First St SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: Team Warnock
subject: you've been selected, friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
We just pulled a list of our top supporters - the people most dedicated to flipping Georgia blue and taking back the Senate - and your name is on that list, friends.
Our Republican opponent - unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler - has spent her entire career serving corporations and special interests instead of working people. You've been _specifically_ chosen because you have valuable insights that we believe can help defeat her in November. **[_So please, friends, will you help us develop a winning strategy by taking our short campaign strategy survey now?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-april-campaign-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk161-su-nd")**
| | [Take the Survey](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-april-campaign-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk161-su-nd")
---
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that Democrats CAN take back the Senate - but only if we win in Georgia. That's why it's so important that we hear directly from supporters like you.
While Kelly Loeffler (R) is already spending millions of her own fortune to try and buy this seat, Reverend Warnock (D) is running a grassroots campaign that puts your interests, your priorities and your concerns front and center.

We're building a coalition of working people from all over Georgia to fight for a brighter, fairer future for ALL, not just the lucky few. But we won't win without your input, friends.
**So please, before this survey expires at midnight tonight: [Complete our short campaign strategy survey now so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-april-campaign-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk161-su-nd")**
| | [Take the Survey](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-april-campaign-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk161-su-nd")
---
Thank you.

Team Warnock

name: Events via MargaretGood.com
subject: CONFIRMED: Margaret, Nikki Fried, and you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17202708/186395114/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmUwZjMyMS0zOTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRL1q_-tuvFrDY0GBRYarOyEA6DUdLjBBNlAK73GbDg=&emci=b23e4ebc-2383-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d6e0f321-3983-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) Hi there -- We wanted to make sure you saw Margaret’s email the other day about our new virtual event series. _In Good Company with Margaret Good_ is our campaign’s way to stay connected while we stay apart. **We’re also SO EXCITED to announce that our first guest will be Florida Commissioner of Agriculture and Consumer Services, Nikki Fried.** You can read Margaret’s full note below, but the bottom line is we’d love to see you this Wednesday at 5:00pm for an uplifting conversation with Rep. Good and our own Commissioner of Agriculture! Please pre-register for Wednesday’s virtual event with Nikki Fried, or for one of our other events using this link: **[https://secure.ngpvan.com/fyvh_9hYgEKmK2VuVgr5-Q2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17202709/186395115/1638746364?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmUwZjMyMS0zOTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRL1q_-tuvFrDY0GBRYarOyEA6DUdLjBBNlAK73GbDg=&emci=b23e4ebc-2383-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d6e0f321-3983-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644)** **Begin forwarded message:**
> Hi friend, With all the stress and uncertainty in our daily lives right now, I am so happy to bring you some GOOD news! I’m excited to officially announce our newest program: _In Good Company_ , a series of virtual events with some of the coolest people in politics! Even though we can’t be out there together knocking on doors and organizing around kitchen tables, that doesn’t mean we can’t be virtually together in our living rooms! So join me and other esteemed leaders, colleagues, and friends as we explore the issues facing our communities, Florida, and our nation. Here’s a short list of some of our special guests: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17202710/186395116/121337317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmUwZjMyMS0zOTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRL1q_-tuvFrDY0GBRYarOyEA6DUdLjBBNlAK73GbDg=&emci=b23e4ebc-2383-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d6e0f321-3983-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) These are just a few of the leaders who you can expect to spend time with -- we have a dozen more partners we’re still working out details with. clean_body: Hi there -- We wanted to make sure you saw Margaret’s email the other day about our new virtual event series. In Good Company with Margaret Good is our campaign’s way to stay connected while we stay apart. We’re also SO EXCITED to announce that our first guest will be Florida Commissioner of Agriculture and Consumer Services, Nikki Fried. You can read Margaret’s full note below, but the bottom line is we’d love to see you this Wednesday at 5:00pm for an uplifting conversation with Rep. Good and our own Commissioner of Agriculture! Please pre-register for Wednesday’s virtual event with Nikki Fried, or for one of our other events using this link: Begin forwarded message: Hi friend, With all the stress and uncertainty in our daily lives right now, I am so happy to bring you some GOOD news! I’m excited to officially announce our newest program: In Good Company , a series of virtual events with some of the coolest people in politics! Even though we can’t be out there together knocking on doors and organizing around kitchen tables, that doesn’t mean we can’t be virtually together in our living rooms! So join me and other esteemed leaders, colleagues, and friends as we explore the issues facing our communities, Florida, and our nation. Here’s a short list of some of our special guests: These are just a few of the leaders who you can expect to spend time with -- we have a dozen more partners we’re still working out details with. By pre-registering, you can support one or all of our virtual events. I’m so excited about this program, and I hope you are too! There’s much more to come, so join us as we grow this series over the next few months. Thanks, Margaret | = --- | To be removed from this email list, please . Hi y'all, While we are all social distancing across the country, many family members are spending most of their time at home where they may be in closer proximity to a firearm. With all that is happening in our country and world right now, we should not have to witness another death that could have been prevented. Therefore this Wednesday at 6:30pm, Sri will be hosting a Virtual Town Hall on Gun Safety & Violence prevention during COVID with Ky Hunter, Vice President of Programs at Brady United. name: Mark Warner
subject: Volunteer to help get out the word!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
Interested in volunteering? Get in touch with me to sign up! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/ea7f16f8e9f407be/28f1717c225ca8cec3d6b838967d376c/33363) Fellow Hoosier, We’re now just weeks away from the June 2nd primary... and Dr. Chuck needs your help! As you likely know, Dr. Chuck is running in a crowded primary field. It’s vital that we reach every Republican voter we can, to share Dr. Chuck’s message and secure the votes we need to win. We’re not able to host events or knock on doors right now. That makes this effort all the more important. **We’ve launched a Digital Days of Action campaign, to reach voters by phone and online.** **[Will you volunteer to help?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/ea7f16f8e9f407be/9927991e6a8e1237c3d6b838967d376c/33363)** We’re going to do this every Saturday between now and June 2nd! Once you sign up, we’ll let you know how to make phone calls to Republican voter lists from the comfort and safety of your home. We’re also asking supporters to contact their friends and family in the 5th District – by phone, text, email, and social media – to let them know what’s at stake in this race and where they can learn more about Dr. Chuck. If you’d like to volunteer, **[you can fill out our sign-up form here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/ea7f16f8e9f407be/034a7098ee486ddec3d6b838967d376c/33363)**. You can also contact me directly at [mark@drchuckforcongress.com](mailto:mark@drchuckforcongress.com) or 317.417.7556. Every vote is going to count in this race... help ensure we leave no stone unturned for Dr. Chuck! Stay safe and God bless, Mark | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/ea7f16f8e9f407be/08b32139bce812b6c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/ea7f16f8e9f407be/1df64941148d93afc3d6b838967d376c/33363)

subject: I need 500 donors today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Out-of-state donors from across the country are funneling millions of dollars into Maine to defeat me. Far left billionaires have teamed up with Senator Chuck Schumer to send unprecedented amounts of money attacking me in Maine. They have spent more money here than in any other state in the country.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDIzMDc5NDcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjE0MjY5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDIzMDc5NDcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjE0MjY5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDIzMDc5NDcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjE0MjY5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Dear Peter,
I wanted to send a personal message to you about the current status of my campaign.
Out-of-state donors from across the country are funneling millions of dollars into Maine to defeat me. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Rewrites the Book on Emergencies
body:
"Washington’s response to the Covid-19 pandemic is upending one of the most durable patterns of American politics." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d08e1b30c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Rewrites the Book on Emergencies**

“Washington’s response to the Covid-19 pandemic is upending one of the most durable patterns of American politics. Throughout history, national emergencies have led to a more powerful and centralized federal government and to the transfer of federal power from Congress to the executive branch. This time, the federal response rests largely on state and local government and private enterprise, with a wave of deregulation clearing the way,” Christopher DeMuth writes in _The Wall Street Journal_.

Rather than exploit Coronavirus to seize more power, “for the first time in U.S. history, an administration is responding to a crisis with deregulation and decentralization.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=393e735c01&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Worried about its global image, China is now trying to cover up its cover-ups.” Amid growing worldwide pressure, “China began revising its numbers, releasing a report last week that raised the death toll in Wuhan, the region in which the virus originated, by more than 50%,” Kaylee McGhee writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=97a4529cf4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Vice President Mike Pence on Saturday told 2020 Air Force Academy graduates that they will inspire Americans with the confidence that the country can overcome the ‘invisible enemy’ in the form of the coronavirus crisis sweeping the nation.” The Vice President spoke at a relatively scaled-down ceremony at Falcon Stadium in Colorado, where cadets sat 8 feet apart, Adam Shaw reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c1c9b65507&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump’s new [Guidelines for Opening Up America Again](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=379315db5c&e=3ee4985eea) “honor the best traditions of American federalism. The 50 states have been affected by the coronavirus in different ways, and governors and local officials can best make the decisions on when to reopen schools and businesses,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8bbb27e0cc&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=76d3bd3dd5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe8147c5bd&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=56e8ef9c19)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: GOP ALERTS
subject: Three major events
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
Team Gardner's April fundraising deadline is only 10 days away. Secondly, Colorado GOP's virtual State Assembly was held this past weekend, putting Cory one step closer to this year's biggest battleground Senate race. And lastly, we're less than 200 days away from Election Day 2020.
Friend, we know there is a lot going on right now, so here's a quick overview of what's happening for Cory Gardner (R-CO) and his grassroots team this week:

_First, Team Gardner's April fundraising deadline is only 10 days away._

_Secondly, Colorado GOP's virtual State Assembly was this past weekend, putting Cory one step closer to this year's biggest battleground Senate race.

And lastly, we're officially less than 200 days away from Election Day 2020._

Friend, it's time to get involved. It's time to take a stand for Cory and the entire Senate Republican Majority. Your support is what matters right now, so please, don't hesitate to get involved in Cory's fight:
**[**DEFEND THE SENATE - 5X MATCH NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014gvCGUTXMdF2DGpORNOu8Td8mLJrNqKwfu1Msofai0cPmBxmnI-FMazJ2Ak_Xx9rvTIfdt00KYHn40elwWmeuoxqT0zCH4eSX3ET0h1gqqAPo_PvKEfct-bJOb5GDWMMaPg8ijcSGwppZaU0qaZEKtTePFJlNG67mgQpu0NI2n9oYJc1_IS3Xili7dOY1xncHoi1syxtbfLXCff39mqLRUSrT8OkSR_aw57bbHtGfbHXPsIpzeh4wYIpTeWX8biULlO6ufSan2D0PUAJsnhPb_DqPG_l5ZZnqkBCMpFC_NaQXDKJ-w8H0-oi9nL8gY0_F8G140HRmrlzgFtWcMDYOuiWnNaVBZOp4QwqGV0SaAUYaAFv6Kvh2_-xf8d9YkMfzknIeXlh2y4=&c=nJaincfngdC2HlMszQzFWIT-u1GThgZZdfDuitXcUkGUQf-K6mH7og==&ch=ReXW89DDS3ahlrJ-z4Xw-RCm4TUAHOZD1I7E_xB_DVqJCInKGapYWg==)**

Don't forget, not only is Cory a leading conservative voice in the Senate who fights for common-sense, pro-growth change in Washington, he's also looking out for the needs of _**all**_ Coloradans.

_**Forfeiting the Senate means the far-Left will stymie the confirmation of pro-Constitution judges, pass radical legislation that degrades our individual liberties and enact their out-of-touch socialist agenda.**_

So you see, Friend, it's vital that we send common-sense legislators like Cory back to Washington to fight for us. If you agree that we need _**principled and proven**_ leaders like Cory to remain in the Senate, then step up now to help Team Gardner keep their momentum going:
**[**DEFEND THE SENATE - 5X MATCH NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014gvCGUTXMdF2DGpORNOu8Td8mLJrNqKwfu1Msofai0cPmBxmnI-FMazJ2Ak_Xx9rvTIfdt00KYHn40elwWmeuoxqT0zCH4eSX3ET0h1gqqAPo_PvKEfct-bJOb5GDWMMaPg8ijcSGwppZaU0qaZEKtTePFJlNG67mgQpu0NI2n9oYJc1_IS3Xili7dOY1xncHoi1syxtbfLXCff39mqLRUSrT8OkSR_aw57bbHtGfbHXPsIpzeh4wYIpTeWX8biULlO6ufSan2D0PUAJsnhPb_DqPG_l5ZZnqkBCMpFC_NaQXDKJ-w8H0-oi9nL8gY0_F8G140HRmrlzgFtWcMDYOuiWnNaVBZOp4QwqGV0SaAUYaAFv6Kvh2_-xf8d9YkMfzknIeXlh2y4=&c=nJaincfngdC2HlMszQzFWIT-u1GThgZZdfDuitXcUkGUQf-K6mH7og==&ch=ReXW89DDS3ahlrJ-z4Xw-RCm4TUAHOZD1I7E_xB_DVqJCInKGapYWg==)**

Thanks so much for your support today, Friend!
_PS: Cory is working to ensure the health and safety of all Coloradans and Americans nationwide during the COVID-19 pandemic. subject: Help us stand up against Pelosi’s smear campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Drew for Congress
body:
.

Both of Jeff's opponents, Amy Kennedy and Brigid Callahan Harrison are fully allying with Nancy Pelosi and the Democrat party's establishment to try to defeat Jeff Van Drew to take this critical district back for the Democrats.
Dear Friend,
Team Van Drew needs your help! We find ourselves at a critical point in this campaign.

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Reporting back
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Last Wednesday was the first FEC reporting deadline of the year, friends .

You can tell a lot about a campaign from its supporters. In our case, that’s you: hardworking folks who have chipped in what you can, because you believe in our movement.

But Andy Barr’s report yesterday showed something else entirely: the power of the Mitch McConnell corporate cash machine. Even with our economy shut down, Barr continued to rake in corporate cash. Nearly 60% of his fundraising came from PACs, not people — and he brought in over $40,000 from Corporate PACs alone.

Our campaign doesn’t take corporate donations. We don’t have a PAC. We’re not going to take checks from special interests. We’re raising money $5, $50, and $100 at a time. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200420_em_fr_eoqreport1resend_all_l1] And it’s working.

We had our strongest fundraising quarter of this campaign, and we did it all while staying true to our values.

Our hard work and your dedication is getting noticed. Just a few weeks ago, we earned the endorsement of VoteVets, the largest advocacy group of veterans working to elect Democrats across the country.

So, thank you for being on our team, and thank you for helping us grow this campaign from an idea into a movement.

Thank you from everyone here,
Josh (for Brett, Nate, Nicole, Lee, and Hadley)

Donate [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200420_em_fr_eoqreport1resend_all_btn]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200420_em_fr_eoqreport1resend_all_ftr1
Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200420_em_fr_eoqreport1resend_all_ftr2]
CONTRIBUTE [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200420_em_fr_eoqreport1resend_all_ftr3]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathy=20Tall?=
subject: Some news for #TeamDani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
I've got an update I want to share with you! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/076a6b0dd746/some-news-for-teamdani?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
**Hello, fabulous Dani for Illinois volunteers!** **First off, thank you all SO MUCH for your incredible work this week and for your support of the campaign. Please keep yourselves safe and healthy, and know that we are here for you during this crisis - you have my number :) ** **I wanted to pass along some amazing milestones from last week that speak to your dedication and hard work, even amidst incredibly trying circumstances. **
* **We completed calls to over 3,000 voters in the 16th District!**
* **Our biggest day was last Wednesday, with 8 volunteers on the phone all over the District.**
* **We added 13 volunteers this week and we have lots of calls scheduled with new folks to bring on in the coming weeks.**

**A few reminders:**

* **If you have friends/colleagues/family members/people you bump into at the grocery store (from 6 feet away, of course) who may be interested in volunteering, please have them reach out or send me their contact info!**

* **Tonight, we have our first[Facebook Live Healthcare Town Hall ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=960f73b429&e=140a9b81e7)at 5:30pm!**

* **On May 4th, we will be hosting our[first digital fundraiser and engagement event with Illinois NOW and Rust Belt Rising!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=4b299d100e&e=140a9b81e7)**

* **We’re hoping to put together a conference call for all of you to meet and chat, since we are not able to meet in person - stay tuned for updates!**

**Again, from all of us on #TeamDani, thank you! Keep up the good work, let’s flip this seat together.** **Kathy Tall** **Deputy Field Director**

Will you sign Ben Ray's emergency petition before midnight to DEMAND vote by mail is expanded during this crisis? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1cb/18e32a7f/4f41178f/7b21e33b/445914188/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/voting-survey?source=20200418_em_pet_b1_vbmav_ia") | As you read this, Trump is furiously plotting to sabotage Democrats' vote-by-mail expansion during this crisis. Why? He just admitted Republicans' chances of winning PLUMMET if more people vote in this election -- [_**it 's despicable.**_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1cb/18e32a7f/4f41178f/7b21e33b/445914188/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/voting-survey?source=20200418_em_pet_b1_vbmav_ia")
[**_BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Ben Ray needs 20,000 emergency signatures to STOP Trump from risking the health of millions to steal this election. Will you sign your name and DEMAND we expand vote by mail? >>_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1cb/18e32a7f/4f41178f/7b21e33b/445914188/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/voting-survey?source=20200418_em_pet_b1_vbmav_ia")
** ** [****NAME** : dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1cb/18e32a7f/4f41178f/7b21e33b/445914188/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/voting-survey?source=20200418_em_pet_b1_vbmav_ia")**** ** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1cb/18e32a7f/4f41178f/7b21e33b/445914188/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/voting-survey?source=20200418_em_pet_b1_vbmav_ia")**
---

We need to move NOW.

Trump wants to stop Democrats from expanding vote-by-mail during this crisis.

[**Why?**_**He just admitted Republicans ' chances of winning PLUMMET if more people vote. **_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1cb/18e32a7f/4f41178f/7b21e33b/445914188/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/voting-survey?source=20200418_em_pet_b1_vbmav_ia")

It's dangerous. It's despicable. And it puts the health of every American at risk.

We must NOT allow Trump and his Republicans to use this crisis to steal the election.

Quickly -- will you sign Ben Ray's emergency petition to ensure EVERY American can safely vote by mail?

[_**SIGN YOUR NAME: We need a MASSIVE uprising -- 20,000 signatures before midnight -- to FORCE Trump to enact national vote-by-mail. This is the most critical election of our lifetime. Will you sign Ben Ray's emergency petition? >>**_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1cb/18e32a7f/4f41178f/7b21e33b/445914188/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/voting-survey?source=20200418_em_pet_b1_vbmav_ia")

Thank you,

Team BRL

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand.
Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1cb/18e32a7f/4f41178f/7b21e33d/445914188/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Team Tina
subject: morally wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hello — Far too many American workers still can't take a single paid day off from work when they get sick. One important way we can do right by them is to ensure these workers have the protections they need and the compensation they deserve during this pandemic. That’s why we must pass universal paid sick leave. Anything less than upholding our responsibility to grocery store, retail, and restaurant workers on the frontlines of this crisis would be morally wrong. **[If you believe we must stand with our workers in sickness and in health, add your name to demand Congress pass universal paid sick leave now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17204674/186437730/-9641710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDFhOGU4NS00YTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=34X34IMZ62Bt5E3sXpuuW5Y84bbRBnh2K48HRlVlYzU=&emci=a1a8457e-4a83-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=e01a8e85-4a83-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)** | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17204675/186437731/-9641710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDFhOGU4NS00YTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=34X34IMZ62Bt5E3sXpuuW5Y84bbRBnh2K48HRlVlYzU=&emci=a1a8457e-4a83-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=e01a8e85-4a83-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)
---
Many of our workers can’t afford to lose a paycheck because it could mean falling into debt or not being able to put food on the table. But it doesn’t have to be this way. We can and must do better.
That’s why Tina and her colleagues are pushing for clear protections for workers — not just during this public health emergency, but always. **[Add your name to support their work today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17204676/186437732/-9641710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDFhOGU4NS00YTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=34X34IMZ62Bt5E3sXpuuW5Y84bbRBnh2K48HRlVlYzU=&emci=a1a8457e-4a83-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=e01a8e85-4a83-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)**
Thank you, as always, for taking action. Stay safe and healthy.
— Team Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

name: Martha McSally
subject: Closing the fundraising gap starts with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
Recent campaign finance numbers show my opponent has a HUGE cash on hand advantage that's growing every day. Will you rush an immediate donation or $35 or more to help provide our campaign the resources to fight back?
[

](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012Rag7Anz3HcvLRmGpMDs5b0LEOoiL-B8AqPOt5dG3y375zTN5AyiywujDyWbGYiwYZvco4jwZLyXvqfKtwG-c4EVJaI1Hcck9o8Azzs8DZ6d2qVU9VkI2pviYDCMAmq5Sf1dX7DagLVbBdrJ19OSMyOU03seEDlJQyC9Yy9uNJ9ODED-DqAfD5zV9ylEOOSPTH7VDRTboKPi8pnNzgKAwuYjfXqlkuUdyJSpjVV0q4r8j8jiBZjcxh0DcGXJUX70NgyKu28tO0-Gpev2fk6PNhtTGJTpCtIFvTpKGanq0F3DL1zCbMJlcTdPNVAq0-wVDHmZWzFCvBtijCD-wUovJ5RYSJo7EgF4jZ_AyuKmUI-hxAxb3dOgFE8IJmyOmrSasUZ0URGjtI1i65G0DHueBQ==&c=_iQt_t75naW5tC1YN5Bj60JJQ9D34jWJhJv2ycNdfmS9EKgiJ_ySBg==&ch=a_ReVrsRlDRJRU2uYtr0F6v16Ce8umZBPujZl-ICz2T5EAjj4xFQww==)
**Alert: Our campaign was outraised by MILLIONS of dollars last month**

Friend,

**The situation is dire.** Recent campaign finance numbers show my opponent has a HUGE cash on hand advantage that's growing every day. [**Will you rush an immediate donation or $35 or more to help provide our campaign the resources to fight back?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012Rag7Anz3HcvLRmGpMDs5b0LEOoiL-B8AqPOt5dG3y375zTN5AyiywujDyWbGYiwwOYOEqo2l7EBACEVvKTfQIxgZy7S02ZAS00vRoOy4uR6E8Vo_QkYE6VQBdM70ecsXkxzUhbc15ffYlPT8hjIBc7XsQ91RESyP3V-D3ggsg0CL9kB-16eoMwO7KRXpBh3Xn_kvDZ2tnBHD1nm6hT0p8xCYCrYt79U5MCF7uB8Qp2BnBnQldyHDXewuFLNrNOfdxtbDpw3sJDHcoMZwjjVEcYH16Ri36uHaEYAhBj5pEmxJcOWe_9-j_KDL1pMvopIc11OnCrljQcpXA1dE-j4rZIhXFwoUSoMihLW8IZUTPkwlaC6pdKtkfgqQkEZ8dcnnUIckdyc3PPvJwpiV1R6kA==&c=_iQt_t75naW5tC1YN5Bj60JJQ9D34jWJhJv2ycNdfmS9EKgiJ_ySBg==&ch=a_ReVrsRlDRJRU2uYtr0F6v16Ce8umZBPujZl-ICz2T5EAjj4xFQww==)

**The truth is, my opponent is well-connected, well-funded, and backed by the Democratic Machine. If we don 't make up ground RIGHT NOW, we could face a very frightening situation in November.

**

body:
MJ is the "favorite" to challenge Sen. Cornyn

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b77/3555638822/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **_DID YOU SEE?_**

**TEXAS SENATE RACE UPGRADED**

_Cook Political Report upgraded their Senate race rating in MJ 's favor!_ **[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b76/3555638822/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1250__&amount=10")**
---

Peter, did you see the news?

The nonpartisan Cook Political Report moved the Texas race rating in MJ's favor -- this is **BIG NEWS**. They called MJ the "favorite" to challenge Sen. Cornyn, but she needs your help to do it! **[Can you chip in?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b76/3555638822/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1250__&amount=10")**

We know that we're building the best campaign to defeat Sen. Cornyn, and this signals that it's working. Our powerful grassroots team has the momentum, but we have to keep it moving. Look: Sen. Cornyn is vulnerable. He's spent 18 years in Washington doing the dirty work of special interests and political bosses like Mitch McConnell, and Texans have had enough. So big-money donors with the Koch network have been spending big to boost his chances.

We don't need to match Sen. Cornyn's big-money donors dollar-for-dollar -- but we DO need enough to execute our campaign plan! **[MJ's counting on this team to get there -- can you chip in?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b76/3555638822/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1250__&amount=10")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b75/3555638822/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1250__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b74/3555638822/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1250__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b6b/3555638822/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1250__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b6a/3555638822/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1250__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b69/3555638822/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1250__")**
MJ isn't taking any money from corporate PACs. She's relying on **[this grassroots team](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b76/3555638822/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1250__&amount=10")** to help build the Texas-sized campaign she needs to win in November.

Peter, with the runoff already underway, **[will you rush a donation right now to make sure MJ is the candidate who takes on and BEATS Sen. Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b76/3555638822/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1250__&amount=10")**

\-- Preston Elliott, Campaign Manager

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b76/3555638822/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1250__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b68/3555638822/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1250&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890322/7f51f7bc/4f08b860/4ef11b6f/3555638822/VEsHAQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Team Scholten
subject: Three strikes, Steve King is out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

Now more than ever, it’s crucial that we have the right leaders in office. We need people who will lead with heart and soul, who will look out for every voice in the district. **We need someone who will go to bat for us every day in Washington -- and that’s J.D.**

During this crisis, Steve King has been silent or saying the wrong things. He voted against the Families First Coronavirus Response Act. He’s not taking action to help our farmworkers facing significant pay cuts. (He hadn’t stepped up to help them prior to the pandemic either.) And he’s still posting memes downplaying the crisis.

**To put this in baseball terms: Three strikes, he’s out.**

The coronavirus has delayed baseball season, but that doesn’t mean you can’t get the baseball card of a hero -- we have J.D. Scholten baseball cards for you!

**[If you can afford to make a contribution right now, we will send you a virtual baseball card of J.D. -- so you can show off who you’re supporting this November!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17204992/186448538/-1641784952?refcode=em20_200420_baseball_in&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTIwZDBlZC00ZTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mhE2MouAZzykE5D3eVHavvsdJNooMG8BEfCFbqGNljg=)**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17204993/186448539/-1641784952?refcode=em20_200420_baseball_in&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTIwZDBlZC00ZTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mhE2MouAZzykE5D3eVHavvsdJNooMG8BEfCFbqGNljg=)
---

J.D. has stepped up in so many ways since the start of this pandemic. From hosting virtual interviews with medical professionals to supporting local businesses on social media and being the first candidate seeking federal office in Iowa to host a COVID-19 event in Spanish, he is proving to be the leader Iowa’s 4th District deserves.

For far too long, Steve King has been failing us -- and during this crisis, we are seeing how important it is that we have leaders who will be our voice in Congress, who will fight for the farmers, frontline workers, students, teachers, and everyone in our district.

**[Help us hit a grand slam this November -- chip in $5 or whatever you can today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17204994/186448540/-1641784952?refcode=em20_200420_baseball_in&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTIwZDBlZC00ZTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mhE2MouAZzykE5D3eVHavvsdJNooMG8BEfCFbqGNljg=)**

Let’s show Steve King **it’s game on.**

\-- Team Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17204995/186448541/-1641784952?refcode=em20_200420_baseball_in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTIwZDBlZC00ZTgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mhE2MouAZzykE5D3eVHavvsdJNooMG8BEfCFbqGNljg=)
_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in Iowa and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! clean_body: Peter, Now more than ever, it’s crucial that we have the right leaders in office. We need people who will lead with heart and soul, who will look out for every voice in the district. We need someone who will go to bat for us every day in Washington -- and that’s J.D. During this crisis, Steve King has been silent or saying the wrong things. He voted against the Families First Coronavirus Response Act. He’s not taking action to help our farmworkers facing significant pay cuts. (He hadn’t stepped up to help them prior to the pandemic either.) And he’s still posting memes downplaying the crisis. To put this in baseball terms: Three strikes, he’s out. The coronavirus has delayed baseball season, but that doesn’t mean you can’t get the baseball card of a hero -- we have J.D. Scholten baseball cards for you! = | = J.D. has stepped up in so many ways since the start of this pandemic. From hosting virtual interviews with medical professionals to supporting local businesses on social media and being the first candidate seeking federal office in Iowa to host a COVID-19 event in Spanish, he is proving to be the leader Iowa’s 4th District deserves. For far too long, Steve King has been failing us -- and during this crisis, we are seeing how important it is that we have leaders who will be our voice in Congress, who will fight for the farmers, frontline workers, students, teachers, and everyone in our district. = Let’s show Steve King it’s game on. \-- Team Scholten = The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in Iowa and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win.

name: Charles Booker
subject: It’s time to legalize marijuana.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
I support the full legalization and decriminalization of marijuana for both recreational and medicinal use because I’ve seen how this so-called “war on drugs” has turned into a war on people.
#
It’s time to legalize marijuana.
Communities like mine have been criminalized for too long.
This plant is already legal for recreational use in 11 states and Washington, D.C., and for medicinal use in 33 states and Washington, D.C. It’s preposterous that we’re still sending folks — disproportionately black folks, poor folks, and young folks — to jail and prison over it.
**That’s why I promise when we defeat Mitch McConnell, we will fight for the legalization and decriminalization of marijuana on the federal level, and for transformative criminal justice reform. **
**[If you’re with me in this fight, can you add your name and let me know? We need to make our support loud& clear.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17205195/186452819/-639557722?source=em20200420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjRiMzgzNS01MjgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vJ0hTdpM4Yl7rOp8s-1w8bs6nXTdpxuBDOZI7BtqIY=&emci=4b340734-4d83-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=a24b3835-5283-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**
****[Legalize Marijuana now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17205196/186452820/-639557722?source=em20200420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjRiMzgzNS01MjgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vJ0hTdpM4Yl7rOp8s-1w8bs6nXTdpxuBDOZI7BtqIY=&emci=4b340734-4d83-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=a24b3835-5283-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)****
I support the full legalization and decriminalization of marijuana for both recreational and medicinal use because I’ve seen how this so-called “war on drugs” has turned into a war on people -- especially people who look like me.
I’ve seen families in my community become targets of a system that thrives off the mass incarceration of brown and Black people.
The full legalization and decriminalization of marijuana will allow us to empower people instead of prosecuting them. It will allow us to spend fewer taxpayer dollars on needlessly locking people up and to bring in much-needed additional revenue for state and local governments.
We’re seeing waves of change beginning in other parts of the country. State leaders are taking the initiative to move toward criminal justice reform and to re-frame the conversation around marijuana.
**[It’s our job now to keep the ball moving and make sure we grow our momentum. Will you help us send a loud message today that public support is growing to legalize marijuana? Please stand with me and add your name.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17205197/186452821/-639557722?source=em20200420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjRiMzgzNS01MjgzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vJ0hTdpM4Yl7rOp8s-1w8bs6nXTdpxuBDOZI7BtqIY=&emci=4b340734-4d83-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=a24b3835-5283-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**

name: Claire Chase For Congress
subject: Former Oil Executive And NM-02 Candidate Claire Chase Blasts AOC for Cheering on Oil & Gas Job Losses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE DATE: March 11, 2020 CONTACT: Mike Berg PHONE: (614) 678-1909 EMAIL: [mike@clairechase.org](mailto:mike@clairechase.org)
---
| Former Oil Executive And NM-02 Candidate Claire Chase Blasts AOC for Cheering on New Mexico Job Losses
ROSWELL, NM - Today, former [oil executive](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bK7WrtoTQM7KmBa0uBKKyzntcGM89_AhH3jEaOt2KcoFU9eWw5FdnbmZkA4KYGDnkBNTALPR99q0XV7Z3wmMyMGbziUOGRPB5to-VrrrtA49xAHTNXJpiCnTY-Wv_TFji3vEe4cg3FBI-0W7ToHXStJWe3JOEwTsthRPSefmhJm9iVqh0HLFTkvdm7sTVgwXJbHQE9cU9mFijRwew8X_hp17YHT_EZNoAX3T9bjb0Y6c4gfPKjC1lA==&c=F9c5EVaoCIctmtyWZfnu3ypcTwCZj7C0ZDjwALuR1wUp2Sii4qP8nA==&ch=Pl7F-kmSq2osc2NmXLgluOdSeDIC1FjkoCwX5Mdy8GsDTw5TjVRSvQ==) and candidate for New Mexico's Second Congressional District Claire Chase blasted Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for [celebrating](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bK7WrtoTQM7KmBa0uBKKyzntcGM89_AhH3jEaOt2KcoFU9eWw5FdnT7huK8m49WT5kGiL68Xj_8WJCcnDKGPVx9k5bxqJE3QJVM9uEVhgPaX7WFqlDpIufR_m3nwvQEWDfRpy2qJ7cSTttipAyy-bJ5l1blf1UqGtSqquz46CqbSpM2tO_9JswZoesOcxDlxdeKj9Nq0cQ8a7wttD4vm2w0--haQuEgZd_oBjDUCnncfBz0wC2LaEdoQosWhHh8vQ4SyTCUGv0Br7ZPwciUh3wCvqkLflMmu&c=F9c5EVaoCIctmtyWZfnu3ypcTwCZj7C0ZDjwALuR1wUp2Sii4qP8nA==&ch=Pl7F-kmSq2osc2NmXLgluOdSeDIC1FjkoCwX5Mdy8GsDTw5TjVRSvQ==) free-falling oil prices that are threatening our national security, the American economy, and over 100,000 New Mexico jobs.
Chase said, "AOC's comments are absolutely disgusting. For the first time ever, oil dropped to negative prices. This catastrophic news will lead to thousands of job losses in New Mexico and is yet another example of why Governor Grisham needs to begin to safely reopen the economy."
Chase also called on current NM-02 Congresswoman Xochitl Torres Small to condemn Ocasio-Cortez' remarks, saying, "Xochitl Torres Small should condemn her buddy AOC for cheering on the economic hell New Mexicans are experiencing. If New Mexico's 100,000 oil & gas workers can't even count on her to do that, what can they count on her for?"

---
| ###
---
| [ClaireChase.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bK7WrtoTQM7KmBa0uBKKyzntcGM89_AhH3jEaOt2KcoFU9eWw5FdnX85bHCJ9jhm2_Sv0M0ztVd_JAJH_TbSmSfv3Uxbsx-bEdqHP-JlXnI7PO8HqfFvIcEr9IWSf2InDdkqK_-sXe-4yOmfTFFFmA==&c=F9c5EVaoCIctmtyWZfnu3ypcTwCZj7C0ZDjwALuR1wUp2Sii4qP8nA==&ch=Pl7F-kmSq2osc2NmXLgluOdSeDIC1FjkoCwX5Mdy8GsDTw5TjVRSvQ==)

name: CoryBooker.com
subject: Add your name: Save the US Postal Service today!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
We need to act fast on this one. |
#
Friends, The US Postal Service is in dire need of emergency funding as the impact of the coronavirus could lead to services being slowed down by June and even stopped entirely by September. **But Trump is playing partisan games with this incredibly important public service and has vowed to veto any bill that would provide relief to our post offices. That 's why we're launching a petition today to speak up and demand emergency relief in order to save over 500,000 essential workers' jobs and keep the Postal Service functioning.** [**We need your help. We can 't afford to let President Trump use the Postal Service and the lives of the many Americans who rely on it as a political pawn. Will you add your name to our petition demanding emergency funding for the US Postal Service?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/save-the-usps?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=1+-+We+need+your+help+We+canrsquot+afford+to&utm_campaign=em200419&source=em200419") | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/save-the-usps?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em200419&source=em200419")
---
**The Postal Service is a critical resource in ordinary times, but especially during this public health crisis.**
First, it's a major source of employment and is one of the largest federal employers in the country.
Keeping our post offices funded will allow more states to take advantage of vote-by-mail opportunities to keep voters safe while still exercising their right to vote this year.
And many elderly and disabled Americans rely on the US Postal Service to receive critical benefits and medications in the mail every month.
[**If you agree that it 's critical we do everything we can to immediately fund the US Postal Service and guarantee it functions throughout this public health crisis, add your name to this petition today:**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/save-the-usps?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=3+-+If+you+agree+that+itrsquos+critical+we+d&utm_campaign=em200419&source=em200419")
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/save-the-usps?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em200419&source=em200419")
---
Thanks for stepping up before it's too late.
Team Cory

PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The pact I made with California and Oregon governors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is why I'm joining my fellow Western governors:
| **From the Desk of
Jay Inslee** Friend, COVID-19 doesn't care about our state borders. It doesn't care about our small businesses. It doesn't care about our plans. And it certainly does not care about politics. And so our response to this crisis demands collaboration, data, steadiness, and empathy. We have seen that we can't just rely on the federal government to keep us safe -- we have to work together as states. That's why I joined with my fellow West Coast governors -- Governor Gavin Newsom of California and Governor Kate Brown of Oregon -- to make a pact on a shared approach of what reopening our state economies might look like. While each state has its own plan, we are committed to three things together:
1. The health of the residents of our states comes first. Period. End of story.
2. All decisions will be made based on health outcomes and science -- not politics.
3. Progress will only be made if we work together.

This is pretty basic, and it's really unfortunate we're not seeing this kind of leadership from President Trump on a national level. But we can't wait -- and it's encouraging to see other governors across the country make similar pacts with their surrounding states, like those in the Northeastern corner of the United States. I'm glad to unite with the other West Coast governors to build a coordinated approach to restarting public life and business while keeping our residents healthy. [**I hope you'll share this news about our Western States Pact with your friends and family on Facebook to let them know we are working together to look out for all our citizens and will continue to do so no matter what.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8555?t=3&akid=8050%2E868730%2EsUIzLc) Very truly yours, Jay | [SHARE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8555?t=4&akid=8050%2E868730%2EsUIzLc)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8050%2E868730%2EsUIzLc). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---

name: Kathy Manning
subject: This team stepped up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
in a big way
|
---

| | This team stepped up in a big way -- 4,203 grassroots supporters have signed our petition calling on the Trump Administration to reopen enrollment for the Affordable Care Act during the current health crisis. Your engagement is now more critical than ever to fight for our values and hold our leaders accountable for their actions. _**[That's why I'm personally asking: Will you add your name and join us in demanding the Administration reopen health care enrollment for the hardworking Americans who are depending on it? We only need 797 more signatures before the end of the night.](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d360/3d199a51/2f73b12c/7364fc42/201454732/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200419s_ns")**_ Thank you, Kathy _\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Kathy Manning_
_Subject: This crisis requires immediate action:_ |
---
This is unacceptable -- we're in the midst of a global health pandemic, but the Trump Administration refuses to reopen Affordable Care Act enrollment so uninsured Americans can sign up for coverage and get the care they need.
More than 30 million Americans are uninsured, and more than 6.6 million Americans have filed for unemployment in the wake of the coronavirus outbreak. For many, that means they are now without coverage, too.
**This is a crisis, and it calls for immediate action. Reopening ACA enrollment is an important step we need to take to make sure millions of American can access care if they get sick.**
[_**Will you add your name to mine and call on the Trump Administration and Republicans to stop their attacks on health care and reopen ACA enrollment for Americans in need? We need 5,000 signatures before midnight tonight.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d360/3d199a51/2f73b12c/7364fc42/201454732/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200419s_ns")
Americans are afraid of not being able to afford their medical bills. And rightfully so -- the average cost for treatment for the coronavirus could add up to more than $20,000.
I understand their fears.
When my youngest daughter was diagnosed with a chronic illness, our insurance company refused to cover the medication she needed and said it would cost us $10,000 per month out of pocket.
[_**No family should have to go through that -- we need to make sure everyone can access the health care they need. Will you be one of the 5,000 grassroots supporters to sign our petition before midnight?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d360/3d199a51/2f73b12c/7364fc42/201454732/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200419s_ns")
Thank you,
Kathy

---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

---
