body:
in times of crisis, Americans should be coming together... While most Americans are coming together in this time of crisis, liberals in Congress are trying to tear us apart. It’s time to say enough is enough & tell them to GET BACK TO WORK! [ **SIGN YOUR NAME >>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=e755d1d34d434a76a013017c9a57fe51&_e=YKrEXCGxwedNCU73LiGbT8W5WQmdEivew3eqhbOrjnw1C7mBV25ajRSNCAi-Y27pX1VM59rPBoWEkxopQ_3xsyHnaAcIZHDhecIkbqxv5TfyVI-BZidZc9vWpdbDcg7RCSGXJsqNijvsaZCsflNAhcjssNLsvdqzBHM06FgBpkD1L2pcd9qxhS3B1Ux9ZTFuKDM2fwKkyaxrTe6NyVV6jeSTEo3LgK10ltC5y4zAgXu83umS940nuxEEkgtV36bldcHjLKeVn7C3H4PzkBIBb5b_om_iC8EWjfTkaJL5lTpU12-EunLCpPCTy_QNKxU0BHc3zhmWqiS827GfxGvYNCI2TtnUlL5idkTqs3BGBkVfB7Ddy0V50ADFeSoanH6jfwdXQ4fmuGRRvKpQcUUbEIS9pOl5RUdHvVUINBke-OpHnLQ1uSBxM7zs3K5xFTC_INdhk3JVoUsagKG1LCQ2eWrsB3j6QU7O7TtEUE1ZiGs%3D) [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=e755d1d34d434a76a013017c9a57fe51&_e=YKrEXCGxwedNCU73LiGbT8W5WQmdEivew3eqhbOrjnw1C7mBV25ajRSNCAi-Y27pX1VM59rPBoWEkxopQ_3xsyHnaAcIZHDhecIkbqxv5TfyVI-BZidZc9vWpdbDcg7RCSGXJsqNijvsaZCsflNAhcjssNLsvdqzBHM06FgBpkD1L2pcd9qxhS3B1Ux9ZTFuKDM2fwKkyaxrTe6NyVV6jeSTEo3LgK10ltC5y4zAgXu83umS940nuxEEkgtV36bldcHjLKeVn7C3H4PzkBIBb0WEq1ky__kaXVxT31Zo7U9gFm-aGe5I0Opi7b-vRb062FVJJ44nAf_0GA7u50lWRpT3Q8JaHbJpTjRmXtBCwuB3VHNurfrUr77EnoaLrMcTJ0vtuJtw-OAYdeZyS7fcU44rcag4rJEX2k5HkFO9SZMjMkDdzq_Az_KESpceP4z9hOghjrRvmQQmVCFGttjd7w4WnTrge1r2c6mX-lzyrdY%3D) | |

Friend, in a time of crisis, Americans should be coming together...

And in so many ways, we are. I’ve seen great things from our communities and our great businesses working to help one another in this time of need.

But in Congress - you don’t see that - not from the partisan liberals like Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Brindisi, anyway.

They’re not using this time to remember their duties or patriotism, they’re using it to push a partisan, anti-Trump agenda, NO MATTER WHO IT HURTS.

And it’s time to say **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.
**

**[I AGREE: TELL LIBERALS IN CONGRESS TO GET TO WORK>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=e755d1d34d434a76a013017c9a57fe51&_e=YKrEXCGxwedNCU73LiGbT8W5WQmdEivew3eqhbOrjnw1C7mBV25ajRSNCAi-Y27pX1VM59rPBoWEkxopQ_3xsyHnaAcIZHDhecIkbqxv5TfyVI-BZidZc9vWpdbDcg7RCSGXJsqNijvsaZCsflNAhcjssNLsvdqzBHM06FgBpkD1L2pcd9qxhS3B1Ux9ZTFuKDM2fwKkyaxrTe6NyVV6jeSTEo3LgK10ltC5y4zAgXu83umS940nuxEEkgtV36bldcHjLKeVn7C3H4PzkBIBbyUBjGyWQBR5z-vMrLeE5C3_lA1viHum9r_wQPPGOGboqmFASAof_3_s04v7n1kAx1AGBw3Fblb7rcNsEA3aWylRDd4IaiOBXcAaD3WN1kpsBrV6amviMTzGENTXtCHOSNNhtOYmyjc4nj72NTYqRX9TroSpa-1AHFgJj1TruyY9v-yu4lflLaGsUWq2AW0IdOiR7w0Uo6WLWqW91ZQhfEk%3D)**
Anthony Brindisi should be fighting for New York right now. We’ve been hit HARD by the Coronavirus and our community, our healthcare workers, and our small businesses are truly struggling.

But instead of fighting for THEM, he’s looking to earn favor with the radical elites who are out there promoting things like the green new deal, demanding reparations and tax cuts for their millionaire pals, and calling for “crimes against humanity” charges against President Trump.

This hyper-partisan game playing has passed the point of offensive and entered the territory of pure madness. It’s time to send our own message on behalf of the people of NY-22: ENOUGH IS ENOUGH - Congress needs to get to WORK for US!
[ **ADD YOUR NAME: SIGN THE PETITION >>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=e755d1d34d434a76a013017c9a57fe51&_e=YKrEXCGxwedNCU73LiGbT8W5WQmdEivew3eqhbOrjnw1C7mBV25ajRSNCAi-Y27pX1VM59rPBoWEkxopQ_3xsyHnaAcIZHDhecIkbqxv5TfyVI-BZidZc9vWpdbDcg7RCSGXJsqNijvsaZCsflNAhcjssNLsvdqzBHM06FgBpkD1L2pcd9qxhS3B1Ux9ZTFuKDM2fwKkyaxrTe6NyVV6jeSTEo3LgK10ltC5y4zAgXu83umS940nuxEEkgtV36bldcHjLKeVn7C3H4PzkBIBb49auRjeGvS66E6U1D5nA2VUftGqAO-cebAnJsc9v0sqIUxWpXQYQklPYX20xgxuZz3i6oXZCMbFZ2DufAfj6zdkVD6GvuT3_hVelcJMIhFDHnjWOkq2qLvhGzFaD9EDqG5AVS8Yev3X8PMInqMgBKgDGQ8TijOEw2wmozioSLdZDboubCpz89A4mzSl__R9o7U0pFLCdzW8Gx9gX-6TFgk%3D)
Friend, in the state of New York, we're dealing with thousands more new cases of Coronavirus daily and millions of dollars lost for business.

Let’s tell Nancy Pelosi, Anthony Brindisi, and liberals in Congress that we’ve had enough of their misplaced priorities.

Join me today by adding your name: **[https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/GetToWork](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=e755d1d34d434a76a013017c9a57fe51&_e=YKrEXCGxwedNCU73LiGbT8W5WQmdEivew3eqhbOrjnw1C7mBV25ajRSNCAi-Y27pX1VM59rPBoWEkxopQ_3xsyHnaAcIZHDhecIkbqxv5TfyVI-BZidZc9vWpdbDcg7RCSGXJsqNijvsaZCsflNAhcjssNLsvdqzBHM06FgBpkD1L2pcd9qxhS3B1Ux9ZTFuKDM2fwKkyaxrTe6NyVV6jeSTEo3LgK10ltC5y4zAgXu83umS940nuxEEkgtV36bldcHjLKeVn7C3H4PzkBIBb8ZwiCD0H_jEPNshM_LPvWAx8c5WSLexy-CyDMbFrDJliFV9aZYnhtxyzTjcLctFUH2Wdf858s9mA5SlloRnkbOx8G_azUMY8nx6eo0JPFY0LkOQkPMTBQVMqkAak3Ga9wq2ygYSIzocI3K9w8jzyIMxItOgvs8dneFl9RWkGaTADiqzZxHmfFpA_aMFKtUKD6yBH9EdXhUOj56DubjnCSo%3D)**

It’s time to say enough is enough & tell them to GET BACK TO WORK! | | Friend, in a time of crisis, Americans should be coming together... And in so many ways, we are. I’ve seen great things from our communities and our great businesses working to help one another in this time of need. But in Congress - you don’t see that - not from the partisan liberals like Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Brindisi, anyway. They’re not using this time to remember their duties or patriotism, they’re using it to push a partisan, anti-Trump agenda, NO MATTER WHO IT HURTS. And it’s time to say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. Anthony Brindisi should be fighting for New York right now. We’ve been hit HARD by the Coronavirus and our community, our healthcare workers, and our small businesses are truly struggling. But instead of fighting for THEM, he’s looking to earn favor with the radical elites who are out there promoting things like the green new deal, demanding reparations and tax cuts for their millionaire pals, and calling for “crimes against humanity” charges against President Trump. This hyper-partisan game playing has passed the point of offensive and entered the territory of pure madness. It’s time to send our own message on behalf of the people of NY-22: ENOUGH IS ENOUGH - Congress needs to get to WORK for US! Friend, in the state of New York, we're dealing with thousands more new cases of Coronavirus daily and millions of dollars lost for business. Let’s tell Nancy Pelosi, Anthony Brindisi, and liberals in Congress that we’ve had enough of their misplaced priorities. Peter,

In January, Tom was the first to warn that the China virus may have come out of a lab leak in Wuhan.

The mainstream media mocked Tom and claimed this was a “conspiracy theory.”

But now, the Washington Post has reported that it is highly possible the virus did come out of a lab accident. These type of leaks have happened before, and China is notorious for horrendous quality controls and rampant dishonesty.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Sign your name if you agree: It's time for a just and equitable cannabis industry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Legalizing marijuana gives us an opportunity to repair some of the damage caused by our current criminal justice system, invest in the communities that have suffered the most harm, and ensure that... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c5/45c30650/1f5c74f23/66e968a2/4233276083/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Legalizing marijuana is about more than just allowing recreational use, or the potential medicinal benefit, or the money that can be made from this new market.

It's about undoing a century of racist policy that disproportionately targeted Black and Latinx communities. It's about rebuilding the communities that have suffered the most harm. And it's about ensuring that everyone has access to the opportunities that the new cannabis market provides.

Here's the way I see it: It's not justice when we lock up kids caught with an ounce of pot while hedge fund managers make millions off of the legal sale of marijuana.

It's time to end that broken system, regulate the industry so it's safe and legal, reinvest the tax revenue earned from marijuana sales to begin to rebuild communities devastated by the policies of the failed War on Drugs, and ensure that those communities are equally able to participate in the budding cannabis industry.

**[Add your name if you agree-- it's long past time to legalize marijuana, erase past convictions, create a cannabis industry that's open to all, and begin to repair the damage caused by our current criminal justice system.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c5/45c30650/1f5c74f23/66e968a5/4233276083/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExN1BfU0dOX0NKUl9FXzIwMjAwNDIwX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-cannabis?source=EMQ17P_SGN_CJR_E_20200420_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Here's part of how we'll do it:
* Legalize marijuana and erase past convictions.

* Roll back Trump's guidance to block immigrants who work in the legal cannabis industry from becoming U.S. citizens.

* Fight for veterans' right to access marijuana.

* Increase federal funding for marijuana research to understand its potential medical uses and ensure that marijuana products being sold are safe and effective.

* Support Tribal sovereignty to make their own drug policies.

* Support the sovereignty of other nations that wish to legalize -- recognizing the role our War on Drugs has had in destabilizing Latin America, a root cause of migration to the United States.

* Make sure that cannabis-related businesses finally have access to the banking system.

* Use the revenue collected from regulated marijuana businesses to establish a fund specifically to support women- and minority-owned small cannabis businesses.

* Fight a market takeover from Big Tobacco that edges out fledgling small businesses before they can ever get off the ground.

* Remove collateral sanctions that prohibit people with drug convictions, disproportionately people of color, from entering cannabis farming, including farming hemp.

* Invest federal and state revenue from the cannabis industry into communities that have been disproportionately impacted by enforcement of our existing marijuana laws.

Legalizing marijuana gives us an opportunity to repair some of the damage caused by our current criminal justice system, invest in the communities that have suffered the most harm, and ensure that everyone can participate in the growing cannabis industry.

Because look: We can't let rich and predominately white hedge-funders and capital investors hoard the profits from the same behavior that led to the incarceration of generations of Black and Latino youth.

We have an opportunity now to get this right. I'll fight to make that happen, but I can't do it alone -- it's going to take a grassroots movement. And that's exactly what we're building together.

**[Add your name if you're in this fight for a just and equitable cannabis industry.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c5/45c30650/1f5c74f23/66e968a5/4233276083/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExN1BfU0dOX0NKUl9FXzIwMjAwNDIwX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-cannabis?source=EMQ17P_SGN_CJR_E_20200420_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285257c5/45c30650/1f5c74f23/66e968a5/4233276083/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVExN1BfU0dOX0NKUl9FXzIwMjAwNDIwX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-cannabis?source=EMQ17P_SGN_CJR_E_20200420_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: What it'll take to reopen RI
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
Hello friend,
As we enter the eighth week since Rhode Island's first confirmed case of COVID-19, we're beginning to look towards the future. Because of the hard work of healthcare workers, dedicated public servants, and other frontline workers across our state, Rhode Island is in a stronger place today than many other states. We have effectively flattened the curve and bought time to prepare to ensure we will not overwhelm our hospital system at any point. So today, I want to spend some time talking through my vision for reopening the economy.
To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cAoTAFaTZA7a8pV-6XXbcVj-F0jkytwmt-d9omMJEaOtBwUejNsJcBeaEWEIXrW_aW3JgLYNKnywMsa8t7JRnJ8kw2YA_TqzL9NS1QuMXnpU07XlSuyUkrX261czVMEqNmsOP_h4WIqQRVorMFwn_ldjMzXpKgbYGJ0hjLYo3Yz3lOer_NgwevIr6fWNBC68UTxohfZMgh0=&c=oITTS_iCTops5B2HrkrFGbNU7pSCR0jautPNLk-sAPGoS2HUXSiB_Q==&ch=IV7JhpQw0noUoL6BmL1aHh3PS6QT5tg0VSQLauAMjM7ScoBByaNQ8A==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
|
---
| I'm the last person who wanted to slow down our economy. I've spent the past six years working to build our economy up, create jobs and put people back to work. To protect public health, we've taken a smart, targeted approach to closing down certain sectors of the economy while keeping people safe. I feel strongly that it's important to maintain some semblance of an economy even as our lives were being turned upside down.
Still, our economy was hit hard by this crisis, and it's not going to bounce back overnight. But I am fully committed to ensuring we are able to reopen Rhode Island and come back strong. I want everyone to understand the principles of our decision making. In other words, what do we need to see in order to be confident that we can start to reopen safely?
Here are our six key indicators:
---
|
---
| To be clear: none of these indicators is an on/off switch. But these are the things I am watching and thinking about constantly as we look toward the coming weeks and months. In all of these decisions we have to be mindful of the potential for effective treatment or a vaccine. We are closely tracking the science around the country, and of course if an effective treatment is developed, these guidelines will change, and we will be able to relax rules much more quickly. But we're not there yet.
We're going to reopen the economy, and we're going to do it safely. I have complete confidence in that. And the reason is you. I've always been inspired by the resilience of Rhode Islanders, and never more so than in the past two months. It's because of all of your patience and cooperation that we've made it this far, flattened the curve and saved hundreds of lives. So please bear with us a little bit longer as we start to work our way back.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor

clean_body: Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update | | | | | | Hello friend, As we enter the eighth week since Rhode Island's first confirmed case of COVID-19, we're beginning to look towards the future. Because of the hard work of healthcare workers, dedicated public servants, and other frontline workers across our state, Rhode Island is in a stronger place today than many other states. We have effectively flattened the curve and bought time to prepare to ensure we will not overwhelm our hospital system at any point. So today, I want to spend some time talking through my vision for reopening the economy. To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's == for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island. | | I'm the last person who wanted to slow down our economy. I've spent the past six years working to build our economy up, create jobs and put people back to work. To protect public health, we've taken a smart, targeted approach to closing down certain sectors of the economy while keeping people safe. I feel strongly that it's important to maintain some semblance of an economy even as our lives were being turned upside down. Still, our economy was hit hard by this crisis, and it's not going to bounce back overnight. But I am fully committed to ensuring we are able to reopen Rhode Island and come back strong. I want everyone to understand the principles of our decision making. In other words, what do we need to see in order to be confident that we can start to reopen safely? Here are our six key indicators: | | To be clear: none of these indicators is an on/off switch. But these are the things I am watching and thinking about constantly as we look toward the coming weeks and months. In all of these decisions we have to be mindful of the potential for effective treatment or a vaccine. We are closely tracking the science around the country, and of course if an effective treatment is developed, these guidelines will change, and we will be able to relax rules much more quickly. But we're not there yet. We're going to reopen the economy, and we're going to do it safely. I have complete confidence in that. And the reason is you. I've always been inspired by the resilience of Rhode Islanders, and never more so than in the past two months. It's because of all of your patience and cooperation that we've made it this far, flattened the curve and saved hundreds of lives. So please bear with us a little bit longer as we start to work our way back. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov in collaboration with |

name: MJ Hegar
subject: we're blunt in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Texans have very sensitive BS meters.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489032e/7f51f7bc/4f0d0526/4ef11e9a/817449677/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

**Texans have very sensitive BS meters.** We know Sen. Cornyn is only looking out for his donors and special interest allies, and we've had enough of it.

I'll be blunt. It's time to give Texans a leader who represents real Texas values: strength, courage, independence, and putting our families first -- because we sure as heck don't value the weakness, partisanship, and gridlock that's representing us now. That's why I'm in this fight -- and with your help -- we can win it. **[If you're already with me you can chip in here>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489032e/7f51f7bc/4f0d0526/4ef11e99/817449677/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1257__&amount=10")**

I have traveled thousands of miles and now I'm on a Virtual Road Trip working with Texans to build a grassroots campaign. **We 're fighting for affordable health care, immediate action to address climate change, and for a government that works for everyday Texans**, not special interests and corporate PAC donors. **[Will you pitch in to our grassroots campaign?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489032e/7f51f7bc/4f0d0526/4ef11e99/817449677/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1257__&amount=10")**

Mitch McConnell, Senator Cornyn and their special interest allies are all too happy to put their interests ahead of ours. **If you 've had enough, then [donate to send Senator Cornyn packing.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489032e/7f51f7bc/4f0d0526/4ef11e99/817449677/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1257__&amount=10")**

Onward,
MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489032e/7f51f7bc/4f0d0526/4ef11e99/817449677/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200420.2nd__1257__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489032e/7f51f7bc/4f0d0526/4ef11e98/817449677/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1257&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489032e/7f51f7bc/4f0d0526/4ef11e9f/817449677/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: A first in U.S. history
body:
America is winning its war on the Coronavirus. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b64baed391&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 20, 2020
---
| | |
# **A first in U.S. history**

**America is winning** its war on the Coronavirus. President Trump announced another milestone over the weekend: More than 4 million Americans have now been tested.

**“That’s a record** anywhere in the world,” he said. The United States has now conducted more tests than France, the United Kingdom, South Korea, Japan, Singapore, India, Austria, Australia, Sweden, and Canada— _combined_.

🎬 [Kellyanne Conway: It’s time to work together toward reopening America.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b7425da280&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump’s response** is unprecedented for another reason, too—one that most Americans won’t see covered in the news. “Throughout history, national emergencies have led to a more powerful and centralized federal government,” Hudson Institute Distinguished Fellow Christopher DeMuth writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3f45c3a972&e=3ee4985eea).

**Until now.** “For the first time in U.S. history, an administration is responding to a crisis with deregulation and decentralization,” he says.

**Here’s why.** Career politicians, both in Washington and around the world, have one instinct during an emergency: to grab power. It’s rarely temporary, and it often has little to do with the situation at hand. Instead, politicians create more agencies and more red tape, claiming that Bigger Government will prevent the next great threat.

**The opposite happens**. A slow, bureaucratic response globally made the Coronavirus worse. The World Health Organization, with its $2.4 billion annual budget, didn’t prepare the world for Coronavirus—[it downplayed the risk](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9fbaf3a029&e=3ee4985eea) while parroting claims from the Chinese Communist Party that the virus wasn’t spreading between humans.

**Elsewhere** **in the world** , countries with government-run socialized medicine have been [forced to ration care](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=09642ddf47&e=3ee4985eea), often at the expense of older patients.

**In the United States** , President Trump moved to slash red tape quickly, eliminating outdated rules and bureaucracy around testing, treatments, telemedicine, and more to speed up our nationwide response to his standards.

**President Trump** knows that Washington works best when it leads, not controls. His priority is making sure that every state, locality, and frontline worker has the resources needed to fight this virus. Whether it’s [securing more ventilators](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7c203e2c58&e=3ee4985eea) or [rapidly expanding testing](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e842f0b4c6&e=3ee4985eea), he’s brought in the full power of America’s best-on-Earth private sector to help.

**The results** show that America is unstoppable when it works together. Closely watched areas such as New York, Detroit, and New Orleans are stabilizing and seeing progress. Nationwide, the latest data suggests that America is past its peak for new cases—and on track to see far fewer deaths than even the most optimistic models once projected.

**The President** knows who to thank for winning this war: you. Our nation’s doctors, nurses, innovators, essential workers, and patriotic citizens are the best in the world.

**“The** **American people** have done a hell of a job,” he says.

[Vice President Pence: Our large metro areas appear to be past their peak.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2f093f5d77&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE** : [See President Trump’s phased approach for Opening Up America Again!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0b03716def&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump takes questions from the press** | April 19, 2020
---
|

---

---

name: Christy Smith
subject: New goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Over the weekend, so many of you stepped up in so many ways.

We held a virtual day of action with over 350 volunteers stepping up to help us make calls, send text messages, and write letters to folks in the district to discuss why our race is so important.

And over 500 of you stepped up to make a grassroots contribution to my campaign. We were so blown away by the support we received over the weekend that **we've raised our goal to 1,000 grassroots donors!**

**[So, Peter, if you can, can you join my grassroots donor team today by making a contribution of $5 or whatever you can?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7e/29776869/a283633/569f51f2/1036227544/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_newgoal-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7e/29776869/a283633/569f51f3/1036227544/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_newgoal-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7e/29776869/a283633/569f51cc/1036227544/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_newgoal-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7e/29776869/a283633/569f51cd/1036227544/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_newgoal-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7e/29776869/a283633/569f51ce/1036227544/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_newgoal-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7e/29776869/a283633/569f51cf/1036227544/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_newgoal-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7e/29776869/a283633/569f51f2/1036227544/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_newgoal-full")
We're so grateful for the way you all have stepped up to help us meet this goal. I can't tell you how much it means to me to receive this support. As this election is getting closer and closer, things are heating up, and we need you now more than ever.

We've had our race ratings change to Toss-Up, we're seeing more Republican special interest spending than we could have imagined, and we're running during a global pandemic.

Through all of this, I've been concerned for my friends and family; I've worried about the millions of people applying for unemployment; and I've thought about the frontline workers doing so much for us and how we can ever repay them.

One thing I have not had to worry about, however, is that I have you on my team. Your support hasn't wavered. You and I both understand how important this race is, and how important it is that we elect the right leaders to Congress, especially during this pandemic.

**[That's why I'm asking more of you to step up and make a grassroots donation today. I wouldn't ask if it weren't so important for us to show our strength in numbers as we get closer and closer to our special election on May 12th.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7e/29776869/a283633/569f51f2/1036227544/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_newgoal-full")**
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7e/29776869/a283633/569f51f2/1036227544/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_newgoal-full")
Thank you for helping out. I hope you and your loved ones are safe and healthy right now. Keep following directives from the state -- if we keep up the social distancing and other best practices now, we can get through this.

\-- Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7e/29776869/a283633/569f51f2/1036227544/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjBfbmV3Z29hbC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200420_newgoal-full")

Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb7e/29776869/a283633/569f51c9/1036227544/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? clean_body: | []() | | Peter -- Over the weekend, so many of you stepped up in so many ways. We held a virtual day of action with over 350 volunteers stepping up to help us make calls, send text messages, and write letters to folks in the district to discuss why our race is so important. And over 500 of you stepped up to make a grassroots contribution to my campaign. We were so blown away by the support we received over the weekend that we've raised our goal to 1,000 grassroots donors! "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" "" | "" We're so grateful for the way you all have stepped up to help us meet this goal. I can't tell you how much it means to me to receive this support. As this election is getting closer and closer, things are heating up, and we need you now more than ever. We've had our race ratings change to Toss-Up, we're seeing more Republican special interest spending than we could have imagined, and we're running during a global pandemic. Through all of this, I've been concerned for my friends and family; I've worried about the millions of people applying for unemployment; and I've thought about the frontline workers doing so much for us and how we can ever repay them. One thing I have not had to worry about, however, is that I have you on my team. Your support hasn't wavered. You and I both understand how important this race is, and how important it is that we elect the right leaders to Congress, especially during this pandemic. "" "" Thank you for helping out. I hope you and your loved ones are safe and healthy right now. Keep following directives from the state -- if we keep up the social distancing and other best practices now, we can get through this. \-- Christy "" The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win. | | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress. ---|--- |

subject: Gov. Deal endorses Unterman for Congress
body:
Former Georgia Gov. Nathan Deal has endorsed my campaign! | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

I am SO excited to share this BIG endorsement with you:
---
|
---
“Renee Unterman has proven herself to be a passionate, courageous conservative fighter and I’m proud to endorse her campaign for Congress,” said Deal. “The people of Georgia deserve tough and thoughtful representatives, and I am confident Renee will deliver results for her constituents because, believe me, she never stops working. As our state works to provide every Georgian with a bright future, I believe Renee is the candidate who will always do what’s right and get the job done.” - Gov. Nathan Deal
|

I served in the State Senate during Gov. Deal’s two terms and we worked together closely to cut taxes, reform mental health treatment, combat human trafficking and crack down on illegal immigration. I'm humbled to receive his endorsement!

---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Freeze Pelosi’s Paycheck like her Ice Cream!
body:
Nancy Pelosi’s Congress flew home until May 4th to “avoid transmitting Coronavirus”.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372737-876315-4964905-abfefb8c24-6e09e20d61)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372737-876315-4964904-40005c254c-6e09e20d61) Nancy Pelosi’s Congress flew home until May 4th to “avoid transmitting Coronavirus”.

In the meantime, nurses, doctors, grocery store workers and countless other Americans show up to work – every day – because IT’S THEIR JOB!

Even worse, 22 million Americans don’t have a job to return to, and now Pelosi and her Democrats are stalling aid to small businesses around the country!

Pelosi, Frankel, AOC, Ilhan Omar and the rest of Congress and their staff continue to accept their government salaries as millions of American families don’t know how they will afford their next meal or pay their rent.

**If American workers aren’t getting paid, NEITHER SHOULD CONGRESS!**

[**Click here to send a message to President Donald Trump and Treasury Secretary Steve Mnuchin and tell them to “Freeze the pay of Members of Congress until America is Re-Opened!”**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372737-876315-4964904-40005c254c-6e09e20d61)
In between doing rounds on television shows, Nancy Pelosi is lounging in one of her many California mansions, tweeting from her phone to keep American businesses closed.

Democrats in Congress have DONE NOTHING to support the Trump Administration through all of this. Their focus – as always – has been taking shots at the President while sitting on their ass.

Let’s force them to get back to work. Maybe if their own large salaries are on the line they’ll start to take this seriously!

[Send this Tweet to President Trump and Secretary Mnuchin to FREEZE Congressional salaries – WITH NO BACKPAY!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372737-876315-4964904-40005c254c-6e09e20d61)

After you send the message, help me reach millions of Americans with this message [by donating today](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372737-876315-4964904-40005c254c-6e09e20d61).

AOC and her “Squad” along with Pelosi and her establishment Democrats will fight tooth-and-nail to keep me from getting sworn into Congress next year.

As an investigative journalist, I’ve embarrassed ALL of them on video – even exposing Ilhan Omar for marrying her own brother and putting illegal aliens on Nancy Pelosi’s lawn.

I’m the last woman on earth they want to see in Congress – and they’re going to have to spend big to beat me.

[Help me give them the run of their lives by donating today.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372737-876315-4964904-40005c254c-6e09e20d61)

But before you donate, be sure to send that message so that we can . . .
* **Freeze Nancy Pelosi’s $223,500 Salary**
* **Stop Alexandria Ocasio Cortez’ $174,000 Salary**
* **Put Ilhan Omar’s $174,000 a year salary on ICE.**
* **And force all 435 members of Congress to take American jobs seriously or they don’t get paid!**

During this economic emergency, there are two classes who have emerged, the government class and the rest of us.

Our jobs are NOT guaranteed, our next paycheck is always in limbo, but for politicians and government workers, they always end up getting their full salary each year.

[Let’s see how members of Congress feel when they lose their income!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372737-876315-4964904-40005c254c-6e09e20d61)

Thanks so much for all you do and don’t forget to [tell President Trump to freeze Pelosi’s paycheck!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372737-876315-4964904-40005c254c-6e09e20d61)

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-372737-876315-84585d41bbe610b-6e09e20d61)

---

Here's the truth, friend: **If we lose in Georgia, Democrats have no chance to take back the Senate this year. **That's why leaders like Stacey Abrams are ALL IN to elect Reverend Warnock (D) - he's fighting to expand access to affordable health care, protect voting rights and defend the dignity of working people.** **
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e722/288179be/a0cfd6d/348e8519/1676310140/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTYwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

But right now, Kelly Loeffler (R) is pouring $20 _million_ of her own fortune into this race to buy this seat - and even worse, a Trump-linked super PAC just named Georgia one of its TOP targets this election cycle.
**That 's why we need to raise another $5,389 by midnight tonight so we can fight back against Republican attacks, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats!**

name: Another Fauci ALERT [via 314ActionFund.org]
subject: right-wing extremists want Dr. Fauci FIRED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| Team,

Since Donald Trump retweeted "Time to #FireFauci," he's wasted no time in fomenting chaos.

In fact, chants of "fire Fauci!" are now commonplace at the growing number of far-right rallies popping up around the country like an absurd game of whack-a-mole.

[It is outrageous that Dr. Fauci -- America's preeminent disease expert -- could lose his job because he's an honest public servant. Add your name to demand that Trump not fire Dr. Fauci:](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c48/4bd7760e/5afe2711/77af500f/331228112/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-dr-fauci-is-saving-lives-trump-must-not-fire-him-2?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-2004-up-fauci%3Famount%3D25%26refcode%3D314_ACQ_JA_2004_FauciJA_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+It+is+outrageous+that+Dr+Fauci+mdash+Ame&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200420_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Fauci&refcode=314_EM_JA_200420_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Fauci")
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c48/4bd7760e/5afe2711/77af500e/331228112/VEsE/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-dr-fauci-is-saving-lives-trump-must-not-fire-him-2?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-2004-up-fauci%3Famount%3D25%26refcode%3D314_ACQ_JA_2004_FauciJA_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200420_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Fauci&refcode=314_EM_JA_200420_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Fauci")
---
Dr. Anthony Fauci put his career on the line to save American lives by _telling the truth -- despite Donald Trump's attempts to silence it_. Now, a growing movement of right-wing extremists are protesting the very policies that are keeping Americans alive.

Team, we simply cannot afford to lose him. Tens of thousands of Americans have died, and tens of thousands -- _possibly hundreds of thousands_ -- more will lose their lives if Trump gets his way.

Stand up for Dr. Fauci and scientific integrity today:

Sign on: [https://secure.314action.org/petition/save-fauci](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c48/4bd7760e/5afe2711/77af500d/331228112/VEsF/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-dr-fauci-is-saving-lives-trump-must-not-fire-him-2?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-2004-up-fauci%3Famount%3D25%26refcode%3D314_ACQ_JA_2004_FauciJA_1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+httpssecure314actionorgpetitionsavefauci&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200420_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Fauci&refcode=314_EM_JA_200420_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_Fauci")

name: Flip the Senate via Voter Protection Project
subject: Susan Collins is more vulnerable than ever.

body:
---
| | We MUST make November 2020 the END OF THE ROAD for Susan Collins' political career. [](https://go.protectvoting.?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_collins_mar2020?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200420_Collins2009_U1_X2&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200420_Collins2009_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200420_Collins2009_U1_X2") Republican Senator Susan Collins pushed hard for Mitch McConnell's stimulus proposal, which created a no-strings-attached $550 billion slush fund, saying "We don't have another minute to delay acting!" Yet in the 2009 negotiations for the last stimulus bill, **Collins STRIPPED OUT $870 million for pandemic preparedness.** "What does that have to do with an economic stimulus package?" she whined to CNN. This is yet another example of our country SUFFERING because of Senator Collins' poor judgment. **(Don 't forget her votes for the GOP tax bill, for the impeachment cover-up, and for Brett Kavanaugh!) ** [**We MUST make November 2020 the END OF THE ROAD for Susan Collins ' political career. Our Senate Battleground Fund is closing in on 10,000 grassroots contributions -- can you help hit our end-of-quarter goal and help defeat Collins this year?**](https://go.protectvoting.?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_collins_mar2020?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200420_Collins2009_U1_X2&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+We+MUST+make+November+2020+the+END+OF+TH&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200420_Collins2009_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200420_Collins2009_U1_X2") | | | [DEFEAT COLLINS](https://go.protectvoting.?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_collins_mar2020?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200420_Collins2009_U1_X2&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+DEFEAT+COLLINS&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200420_Collins2009_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200420_Collins2009_U1_X2")
---

Even afterward, Senator Collins was PROUD of stripping pandemic funding from the stimulus bill.

As _The Nation_ reported shortly after the vote: "Even now, Collins continues to use her official website to highlight the fact that she led the fight to strip the pandemic preparedness money out of the Senate's version of the stimulus measure."

Fortunately, we have a dynamic Democratic challenger in Sara Gideon, the Speaker of the Maine House.

**The momentum is stronger than ever for Sara Gideon --_Roll Call _JUST moved this race from "Lean Republican" to a TOSS UP!**

[**If we are able to communicate Collins ' disastrous records (spanning decades!) to Maine voters, we can flip Maine's Senate seat -- and with it, control of the U.S. Senate. Chip in to our Senate Battleground Fund today -> **](https://go.protectvoting.?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_collins_mar2020?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200420_Collins2009_U1_X2&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+If+we+are+able+to+communicate+Collinsrsq&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200420_Collins2009_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200420_Collins2009_U1_X2")
